note: All figures correspond to [modeled ILO estimates](#dod:ilo-modelled-estimates). ILO definitions are according to the [ICSE-93 standard](#dod:icse-93). Employment is defined in line with the [13th ICLS](#dod:13-icls) and includes the production of goods for own use, such as subsistence farming.
title: Employment by status
subtitle: Status categories follow [ILO](#dod:ilo) definitions: employees work for an employer and receive wages or a salary, employers are self-employed workers with staff, independent own-account workers are self-employed workers without staff, and contributing family workers are self-employed workers in a household business or farm.
